---
name: New study or topic
about: Suggest a study to add, or a new topic for the vault
title: "[Study] "
labels: new-study
assignees: ''
---

## What is the study or topic?

Name the study (or, if proposing a new note topic, name the topic).

## Why does it belong in the vault?

One paragraph. The vault includes a habit only if there's strong primary evidence and clear daily relevance. What's the evidence base? Which existing note (if any) does it complement or contradict?

## Primary source(s)

Link 1–3 peer-reviewed primary sources. Meta-analyses and large cohort studies preferred over single small RCTs. Please include DOI or PubMed ID.

- [Citation](URL)

## Anything else?

Optional: relevant note in the vault, related popular claims that should be addressed, etc.
